this is test content.

# What the Program Does
This program compares two directory structures (dir1 and dir2) and writes a report detailing the differences to a specified output file. It categorizes changes into five distinct groups:

* Modified Files: Files that exist in both directories at the same relative path but have different contents.
Moved / Renamed / Copied Files: Files that have identical contents (based on their hashes) but exist at different paths.
Deleted Files: Files that exist in dir1 but do not exist in dir2 by path or content hash.
Added Files: Files that exist in dir2 but do not exist in dir1 by path or content hash.
Empty Directories: Tracks empty directories that were added or deleted.
